BatchGetCaseRule.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the case rules in the case domain

BatchGetField.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the fields in the case domain

BatchPutFieldOptions.description: Grants permission to update the field options in the case domain

CreateCase.description: Grants permission to create a case in the case domain

CreateCaseRule.description: Grants permission to create a case rule in the case domain

CreateDomain.description: Grants permission to create a new case domain

CreateField.description: Grants permission to create a field in the case domain

CreateLayout.description: Grants permission to create a layout in the case domain

CreateRelatedItem.description: Grants permission to create a related item associated to a case in the case domain

CreateTemplate.description: Grants permission to create a template in the case domain

DeleteCase.description: Grants permission to delete the case in the case domain

DeleteCaseRule.description: Grants permission to delete the case rule in the case domain

DeleteDomain.description: Grants permission to delete the domain

DeleteField.description: Grants permission to delete the field in the case domain

DeleteLayout.description: Grants permission to delete the layout in the case domain

DeleteRelatedItem.description: Grants permission to delete the related item associated to the case in the case domain

DeleteTemplate.description: Grants permission to delete the template in the case domain

GetCase.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a case in the case domain

GetCaseAuditEvents.description: Grants permission to view audit history of a case

GetCaseEventConfiguration.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the case event configuraton in the case domain

GetDomain.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the case domain

GetLayout.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the layout in the case domain

GetTemplate.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about the template in the case domain

ListCaseRules.description: Grants permission to list case rules in the case domain

ListCasesForContact.description: Grants permission to list cases for a specific contact in the case domain

ListDomains.description: Grants permission to list all domains in the aws account

ListFieldOptions.description: Grants permission to list field options for a single select field in the case domain

ListFields.description: Grants permission to list fields in the case domain

ListLayouts.description: Grants permission to list layouts in the case domain

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for the specified resource

ListTemplates.description: Grants permission to list templates in the case domain

PutCaseEventConfiguration.description: Grants permission to insert or update the case event configuration in the case domain

SearchCases.description: Grants permission to search for cases in the case domain

SearchRelatedItems.description: Grants permission to search for related items associated to the case in the case domain

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add the specified tags to the specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove the specified tags from the specified resource

UpdateCase.description: Grants permission to update the field values on the case in the case domain

UpdateCaseRule.description: Grants permission to update the case rule in the case domain

UpdateField.description: Grants permission to update the field in the case domain

UpdateLayout.description: Grants permission to update the layout in the case domain

UpdateTemplate.description: Grants permission to update the template in the case domain

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request
